items.title_en: Iran war, $4 gas, took all the fun out of the U.S. consumer economy. There's only so much time to bring it back

items.desc_zh: 在美伊战争和油价 4 美元的背景下，消费者仍在消费，但娱乐和餐饮场所的减少对当地经济造成了沉重打击。

items.desc_en: Experts say going back to school for a graduate degree is one way to hedge against a rapidly changing labor market.
items.desc_zh: 专家表示，重返学校攻读研究生学位是应对快速变化的劳动力市场的一种方法。

items.title_en: Berkshire shares left behind as S&P 500 rallies to record high
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数上涨至历史新高，伯克希尔股价落后
items.desc_en: While the overall market was soaring over the past two weeks, Berkshire wasn't doing much of anything, as its shares slipped to MTD drops of just under 1%.
items.desc_zh: 虽然过去两周整体市场飙升，但伯克希尔并没有采取任何行动，其股价下跌至 MTD 跌幅略低于 1%。

items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，在财报公布前值得购买的五只股票包括一家特定的科技巨头

items.desc_zh: 美国银行表示，在发布最新财务数据之前，看好包括苹果在内的股票。

items.title_zh: 这些芯片制造商和其他股票在本周市场反弹后已超买
items.desc_en: Investors should be on the lookout for pullbacks in rallying chipmakers and other stocks after the market's advance.

items.title_en: Nvidia's once-tight bond with gamers is cracking over AI, 'and that breaks my heart'
items.title_zh: 英伟达与游戏玩家一度紧密的关系因人工智能而破裂，“这让我心碎”
items.desc_en: Gamers once helped save Nvidia from bankruptcy. Now they feel left behind as the memory crunch drives focus to AI chips and DLSS 5 disrupts game design.
items.desc_zh: 游戏玩家曾经帮助英伟达免于破产。现在，由于内存紧缺促使人们将注意力集中在 AI 芯片上，而 DLSS 5 扰乱了游戏设计，他们感觉自己被落在了后面。

items.title_en: 'It's just scale': Local mom-and-pop car dealerships are growing or dying amid industry consolidation, rise of mega-retailers
items.title_zh: “这只是规模”：随着行业整合和大型零售商的崛起，当地夫妻汽车经销商正在成长或消亡
items.desc_en: Multibillion-dollar dealerships have been on the rise amid a decadeslong consolidation that has led to a grow-or-die mentality for many U.S. auto retailers.
items.desc_zh: 经过数十年的整合，价值数十亿美元的经销商不断增加，这导致许多美国汽车零售商抱有“要么成长，要么灭亡”的心态。

items.title_en: French film star Nathalie Baye dies aged 77, media report
items.title_zh: 媒体报道法国影星娜塔莉·贝伊去世，享年 77 岁
items.desc_en: President Macron said France had "loved, dreamed and grown up" with the stalwart of French cinema.
items.desc_zh: 马克龙总统表示，法国与法国电影的坚定力量一起“热爱、梦想并成长”。

items.title_en: Nexstar says it will appeal following U.S. judge ruling halting Tegna merger
items.title_zh: Nexstar 表示将在美国法官裁定停止 Tegna 合并后提起上诉
items.desc_en: Nexstar will appeal a judge's ruling halting its acquisition of rival broadcaster Tegna, as ​antitrust challenges from DirecTV ​and a group of states proceed.
items.desc_zh: 随着来自 DirecTV 和一些州的反垄断挑战的继续，Nexstar 将就法官停止收购竞争对手广播公司 Tegna 的裁决提出上诉。

items.title_en: U.S. renews Russian oil waiver after pressure from countries dealing with Iran war price shocks
items.title_zh: 在应对伊朗战争价格冲击的国家施压下，美国延长了俄罗斯石油豁免
items.desc_en: Lawmakers accused the government of going easy on Moscow as its war on Ukraine grinds on.
items.desc_zh: 立法者指责政府在乌克兰战争持续进行之际对莫斯科采取宽松态度。

items.title_en: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国接收第一批来自美国的被驱逐者
items.desc_en: The Congolese government stresses those expelled from the US are only in the country temporarily.
items.desc_zh: 刚果政府强调，那些被美国驱逐的人只是暂时留在该国。

items.title_en: We spoke to over 30 central bankers, policymakers and politicians. Here are their top concerns
items.title_zh: 我们与 30 多位央行行长、政策制定者和政治家进行了交谈。这是他们最关心的问题
items.desc_en: From stagflation to energy security, policymakers spoke to CNBC about the biggest risks arising from the ongoing U.S.-Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 从滞胀到能源安全，政策制定者在接受 CNBC 采访时谈到了正在进行的美伊战争带来的最大风险。

items.title_en: Trump says U.S. has 'good news' on Iran, talks to continue over weekend
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国有关于伊朗的“好消息” 周末会谈将继续
items.desc_en: President Trump tells reporters that the U.S. and Iran will jointly recover nuclear material after a deal is reached.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统告诉记者，美国和伊朗将在达成协议后共同回收核材料。

items.title_en: Madonna joins Sabrina Carpenter to surprise Coachella

items.desc_zh: 流行天后在浓缩咖啡歌手的头条节目中客串亮相。

items.desc_en: Newspaper headlines: Starmer faces 'judgement day' and 'Breakthrough in the Strait'  BBCStarmer would have blocked Mandelson role over vetting failure, says Lammy  The GuardianU.K.’s Starmer Under Fre
items.desc_zh: 报纸头条：斯塔默面临“审判日”和“海峡突破” 拉米表示，英国《卫报》的斯塔默在 Fre 之下，BBCStarmer 会因审查失败而阻止曼德尔森的角色

items.title_en: White House and Anthropic set aside court fight to meet amid fears over Mythos model
items.title_zh: 由于对神话模型的担忧，白宫和 Anthropic 搁置了法庭诉讼以进行会面
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump previously railed against the company for rejecting broad government demands.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统此前曾批评该公司拒绝广泛的政府要求。

items.title_en: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
items.title_zh: Tinder 和 Zoom 提供“人性证明”眼部扫描来对抗人工智能
items.desc_en: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.
items.desc_zh: 该技术旨在识别人们的虹膜并阻止虚假账户和恶意诈骗的兴起。

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh wants to lead a scandal-ridden Fed. His wealth is a complication

items.title_en: Social media leaders called to Downing Street over children's safety
items.title_zh: 社交媒体领导人就儿童安全问题向唐宁街呼吁

items.desc_zh: Meta 和 YouTube 等公司的高管将被问到他们正在采取哪些措施来保护儿童。

items.title_en: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告
items.desc_en: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_en: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.desc_zh: 凭借该领域一些有前景的计算公司，欧洲能否成为量子技术的领导者？

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。
